name_en: Top-tier Original [Exclusive Photo M12536 Blue] This Lisa wallet is crafted from Monogram canvas and accented with pastel leather lining. The thoughtful design features multiple compartments and card slots, along with a fan-style zip coin pocket featuring an LV Circle logo pull. Stylish and practical. 9 x 11.5 x 1.5 cm (L x H x W)
